---
name: "➕ Add / propose a question"
about: Suggest a new SAA-C03 practice question for the bank
title: "[Question] <short topic> — Domain <n>"
labels: ["new-question"]
---

**Domain:** (1 Security / 2 Resilient / 3 High-Performing / 4 Cost)
**Difficulty:** (Easy / Medium / Hard / Very Hard)

**Scenario & question**
<!-- Paste the scenario and the stem. Include a decisive qualifier — MOST cost-effective, LEAST operational overhead, HIGHEST availability, etc. -->

**Options (A–D)**

**Correct answer + why (the mechanism, not a restatement)**

**Why each distractor fails (one precise reason each)**

**Diagram (Mermaid, if you have one)**

**Sources for any time-sensitive facts (AWS docs links preferred)**

> Prefer to contribute directly? Open a Pull Request using `QUESTION_TEMPLATE.md` — see `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
